title: Dietetic Technician - West / healthcare #HMS
description:
Job Summary

Support dietitians by performing patient pre-clerking, managing nutrition supplement samples, assisting in nutrition education and analysis, and handling administrative and project tasks to ensure smooth dietetic service delivery.

Responsibilities

  • Collect and document patient information including social, medical, weight, diet history, and food frequency questionnaires to prepare for dietitian consultations
  • Manage oral nutrition supplement samples by tracking inventory, ensuring proper storage, and removing expired products
  • Assist dietitians in developing nutrition education materials and slides for internal and external programs
  • Support dietitians in setting up and delivering nutrition education programs and community outreach initiatives
  • Perform nutritional analysis using computer software to support dietetic assessments and projects
  • Update and maintain the Dietetics webpage to provide current information and resources
  • Participate in Quality Improvement Projects by contributing data and insights to enhance service quality
  • Assist in appointment booking and provide reminders to patients who miss appointments to improve attendance
  • Write minutes and reports to document meetings and project progress accurately
  • Handle phone enquiries by answering calls, recording messages, and conveying information promptly
  • Enter data for research projects and expand the Food Composition Database to support dietetic research
  • Collate weekly and monthly statistics to monitor service performance and outcomes
  • Assist managers with administrative tasks related to nutrition services to ensure efficient operations

Required competencies and certifications

  • Min Diploma in Applied Food Science and Nutrition


Interested candidates, do submit your resume to: jocelynchan@recruitexpress.com.sg OR telegram @jocelynchan

Jocelyn Chan| Consultant | Recruit Express Pte Ltd (Healthcare & Lifescience)

Company EA Licence number : 99C4599

Personnel EA License: R1331820
